---
title: Healthcare Services Analytics & Decision Science Atlas
image: homepage.png
---

Since **November 2025**, I have been contributing to the Healthcare Services Analytics & Decision Science Atlas, which is being developed by **Sammi Rosser**.

<iframe
  class="auto-preview"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  src="https://atlas.hsma.co.uk/"
  title="Healthcare Services Analytics & Decision Science Atlas">
</iframe>
